event: The Signing of the Treaty of Versailles
description: A painting depicting a formal gathering of dozens of men in dark suits seated and standing in a grand hall with enormous arched windows. The Hall of Mirrors at Versailles is recognizable by its tall arched windows with ornate gilded decorations above. The delegates are arranged in rows along a long table in the lower portion of the composition, with the towering architectural space dominating the upper half. Light streams through the windows, reflecting on the polished surfaces.

_meta.title: The Signing of Peace in the Hall of Mirrors, Versailles, 28 June 1919
